ListProtectInstances.instanceType: Instance type, valid values: [ eip | nat | etGateway | peerconn | csn | ipv6Gateway ]
ListProtectInstances.marker: The starting position for batch list queries, a system-generated string
ListProtectInstances.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, typically no more than 1000, default value is 1000
ListProtectInstances.status: Protection status, valid values: [ unbind | protected | unprotected ]
ListProtectInstances.region: Region, valid values: [ bj | gz | su | fsh | hkg | bd | fwh | sin ]
